globe.hint: Drag · Scroll to zoom · +/- keys · Double-click auto-spin · 0 to reset

sessions.title: On-Chain Sessions
sessions.no_sessions: No on-chain sessions found for this wallet.
sessions.cancel_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to terminate this session on-chain? Remaining balance will be refunded.
sessions.end_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to terminate this session on-chain? Remaining balance will be refunded.
sessions.msg_cancel_session_hint: This broadcasts a MsgCancelSession transaction on chain.

wallet.setup_sub: ENTER YOUR 12/24-WORD RECOVERY PHRASE TO ACCESS THE NETWORK
wallet.mnemonic_hint: Stored encrypted via OS keychain (safeStorage). Never sent anywhere.
wallet.setup_footer: Wallet credentials are encrypted with OS native storage and only persist on this machine.
wallet.mnemonic_error: Mnemonic must be at least 12 words.
wallet.mnemonic_loss_warning: I am aware that if I forget the mnemonic I could lose the contents of the wallet
wallet.forget_confirm_msg: This will delete ALL stored mnemonics and addresses from this device. This action cannot be undone.
wallet.active_sessions_hint: Active on-chain sessions for this wallet
wallet.label: Label
wallet.remove_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to remove "{{label}}"? The mnemonic phrase will be permanently deleted from this device.

vpn.disconnect_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to disconnect?

settings.title: Settings
settings.sub: VPN behaviour, privacy, and network configuration
settings.ks_sub: Block all non-VPN traffic. On Linux uses iptables; macOS uses pf; Windows uses Windows Firewall.
settings.ks_warn: Requires admin/sudo. Disable before disconnecting if you use split tunnel.
settings.ar_sub: Automatically reconnect on unexpected disconnection. Up to 5 attempts with exponential back-off.
settings.dns_sub: Applied to WireGuard DNS= field. For V2Ray, configure your system DNS separately. Requires reconnecting to take effect.
settings.st_sub: Only route specified subnets through VPN. WireGuard only — replaces AllowedIPs = 0.0.0.0/0 with your routes.
settings.st_routes_hint: Default routes exclude RFC-1918 local ranges. Reconnect to apply. To add the entire internet: add 0.0.0.0/0 (same as off).
settings.about_footer: Mnemonic encrypted via OS keychain (Electron safeStorage). Private key never leaves the main process. All node API calls are proxied through the Electron main process.

quit.message: You have an active VPN session.
quit.password_warning: System password may be required to tear down tunnel.

dns.title: DNS Conflict Detected
dns.message: Your system's DNS manager rejected the config.

ip.title: Network Identity
ip.check_connection: Check your internet connection or firewall settings.

node_modal.session_not_found: Blockchain session info not found for this node.
node_modal.support_desc: Add 10% ({{amount}} P2P) to this transaction to support the ChibaTunnel project. Your contribution helps us maintain and improve this app!
node_modal.handshake_success_banner: Handshake completed, your Session ID is #{{sessionId}}. Choose what you want to protect and how:
node_modal.connect_mode_title: How do you want to connect?
node_modal.mode_full_desc: All apps and system traffic go through the tunnel.
node_modal.mode_proxy_desc: Only apps you manually configure will use this connection.
node_modal.mode_proxy_info: After connecting you'll get an address and port to set manually in your browser or app's proxy settings.
node_modal.other_device_desc: Scan the QR code or copy the link into a compatible app.
node_modal.other_device_v2ray_hint: On Android, import the link/QR into v2rayNG. On iOS/macOS, use Shadowrocket or Streisand.
node_modal.other_device_wg_hint: Scan the QR or import the file using the official WireGuard app (Android, iOS, Windows, macOS, Linux).
node_modal.close_use_other_device: Close — I'll connect from another device
node_modal.proxy_active_hint: Manually set this proxy in the network settings of the app or browser you want to protect.
node_modal.proxy_howto_link: How do I set this up?
node_modal.proxy_howto_chrome: Chrome / Edge: Settings → System → Open your computer's proxy settings
node_modal.proxy_howto_firefox: Firefox: Settings → Network Settings → Manual proxy configuration

binary.not_found: Executable not found in system PATH
binary.exec_success: Command executed successfully. Please re-check binaries.

why.wireguard: Required for high-performance kernel-level VPN tunnels.
why.tun2socks: Required for system-wide V2Ray support via TUN interface.

binary.wintun_missing: Windows requirement: Place 'wintun.dll' in the same folder as tun2socks.exe.

renewal.title: Auto-Renewal Policy
renewal.policy_2: If price drops or stays same
renewal.policy_6: If price increases or stays same
renewal.desc_0: Subscription will expire at the end of the term.
renewal.desc_1: Protects you from price increases. Renews only if the provider lowers the price.
renewal.desc_2: Standard protection. Renews only if the provider does not raise the price.
renewal.desc_3: Renews only if the exact price is maintained.
renewal.desc_7: Renews regardless of price changes by the provider or oracle.
renewal.desc_other: Advanced policy based on price movement.
